calendar.matters:
Declaration For Application For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 am and concluding at 9:45 am

Plaintff Wells Fargo Bank is represented by Yvonne Ramirez-Browning, Esq.
Defendant Jason Tan aka Jason W. Tan aka Jason Wanbintan and DBA Jason Tan Electric not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, and against Defendant Jason Tan aka Jason W. Tan aka Jason Wanbintan and DBA Jason Tan Electric, as follows:

1. Damages: $87,721.09
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $608.95
4. Attorney fees waived.

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $91,155.04
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFFS WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Set Aside Dismissal is granted.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: C. Loke. (301/RCE)
